system.notes:
U.S. armed-forces powered armor (game rules in Maximum Metal; stats printed in Home of the Brave).

Manufacturer: Militech/GE. Chassis: Titan, STR 40. Chassis weight: 200 kg. Capacity/carry: 2000 kg / 600 kg. Reflexes: Low-Boost Reflexes. SIB/DFB: 0/+2. Punch 4D10, Kick 7D10, Crush 5D10. Toughness mod: -10. Trooper size: 115 kg. Total weight: 1566 kg. Total cost: 246,700 eb.

Per-limb armor: all locations SP 40. Main/loadout: 30mm autocannon (external torso: 75mm recoilless w/2 reloads; 6-pod QBA light ATGM, reloadable, w/2 reloads).

The per-location internal/external SDP and full weapon-slot loadout are printed as an interleaved grid; only cleanly readable cells are transcribed here. See Home of the Brave p.88 image for the complete grid.

needsEyes: Per-location internal/external SDP and full weapon-slot loadout: printed grid is column-interleaved in the text layer; not transcribed. Read from Home of the Brave p.88 image.
